//: Hardened RTDB rules for lunch-f7021. Paste into Firebase console > Realtime Database > Rules.
//1: Default deny at the root. Every path must be listed explicitly.
//2: auth != null == request carries a (anonymous) Firebase auth token. Requires Anonymous
//3: sign-in enabled in Authentication, AND each client to call signInAnonymously() before
//4: reading/writing. Deploy the auth-enabled clients FIRST, then publish these rules.
//5: worldcup and alaska-trip are intentionally left OPEN — both are live with active users
//6: whose cached pages have no auth. Migrate them last (see SECURITY.md).

worldcup.//: LIVE tournament — leave open until it ends, then migrate.

alaska-trip.//: LIVE trip — leave open until travelers are home, then migrate.

calls.//: Most sensitive: private call transcripts. Migrate first.
